trait.title: ExamplePitFighter
trait.Name: [color=#af8f50]Example Pit-Fighter[/color]
trait.Description:
On [color=#ff8030]attack[/color], [color=#ff5050]if[/color] Main-hand is a [color=#ffff50]bare fist[/color]:

     perform [color=#ffff50]2 extra attacks[/color] against the target

On [color=#ffff50]block[/color], [color=#ff5050]if[/color] Main-hand is a [color=#ffff50]bare fist[/color]:

     perform [color=#ffff50]1 counterattack[/color] against the attacker
trait.Description_Unit: On attack / block with bare fists: perform extra attacks.

lore.title: ExamplePitFighter
lore.text: An example prestige showing a straightforward [color=#af8f50]Guard[/color] and [color=#af8f50]Pugilism[/color] path.
